root_cause: Preemption is ineffective because topology spread constraints cannot be satisfied
evidence: FailedScheduling events include both preemption attempts and topology spread constraint violations
Multiple scheduling retries within short window
Scheduler indicates preemption is not helpful

Dominant scheduler message: 0/3 nodes are available: 2 node(s) didn't match pod's topology spread constraints, 1 Insufficient cpu. preemption: 0/3 nodes are available: 3 Preemption is not helpful for scheduling.

causes.message: Topology spread constraints restrict valid node placement
Preemption cannot create a placement that satisfies topology constraints
Scheduler rejects all nodes due to unsatisfied topology constraints
Pod remains Pending because topology spread constraints stay unsatisfied

pod:topology-preemption-pod: Topology spread constraints prevent scheduling even with preemption

likely_causes: Topology spread constraints are too strict for current cluster state
Insufficient nodes across required topology domains
Uneven pod distribution prevents restoring the required spread
Preemption cannot change the topology-domain imbalance
suggested_checks: Verify topologyKey labels exist on nodes
Inspect the distribution of matching pods across topology domains
